# Inspection Address Helper: Current Status

## Intended State

`integration_grill_plan.md` is the authoritative target for inspection-address assistance, provider inspection policy, address evidence ranking, and `Image Based Assessment` fallback behavior.

## Current Implementation

Source-backed inspection-address normalization and readiness helpers exist, but the full assistance pipeline using corpus, OCR, EXIF/GPS, signage/phone evidence, governed search, or AI has not been implemented.

Relevant implementation files include `src/lib/inspection-location.ts`, `src/parser/`, and case readiness/EVA submission code.

## Next Implementation Position

Keep the current source-backed safeguards and implement assistance as governed enrichment. Do not guess addresses or silently fallback to image-based assessment.
